mustPass: Scaffold must reflect textile manufacturing needs with dedicated product and production pages.
Home and contact routes must always be present.
Every default route must have a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Copy structure must support inquiry/contact conversion rather than checkout flows.
Trust signals should use real company facts, references and contact details.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic local-service structure without manufacturing-specific pages
restaurant, portfolio or ecommerce-specific routes that do not fit the industry
invented certifications, production volumes or customer counts
overpromising fixed prices or lead times without supporting data
repeating the same trust claim in multiple adjacent sections
